headline: The CEO Preaching Straight Talk About AI and Job Losses
summary: Verizon’s Dan Schulman is all in on AI. But he warns that it is time for business leaders to acknowledge its disruptive potential.

raw.headline: The CEO Preaching Straight Talk About AI and Job Losses

headline: Verizon World Cup Sponsorship Puts 5G Investments And Valuation In Focus
summary: Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ) has been named the Official Telecommunication Services Sponsor for the FIFA World Cup 2026 and FIFA Women's World Cup 2027. The company plans major nationwide investments in 5G, fiber, and network capacity to support venues, fans, and tournament operations. Verizon's role includes providing critical connectivity, public safety support, and long term community benefits in host cities across North America. For investors tracking NYSE:VZ, this sponsorship...

headline: Verizon: Path Back Down To $40
summary: Verizon's growth is hampered by heavy investment in legacy broadband assets and limited participation in the satellite broadband boom. Read why VZ stock is a Sell.
